𝗢𝗛𝗠𝗬𝗖𝗔𝗣𝗧𝗖𝗛𝗔 | To provide a self-hosted, automated CAPTCHA solving service with a YesCaptcha-compatible API, enabling integration into applications like flow2api or other systems requiring automated CAPTCHA resolution.  🔍 Worth a Look

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a self-hosted, automated CAPTCHA solving service with a YesCaptcha-compatible API, enabling integration into applications like flow2api or other systems requiring automated CAPTCHA resolution.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Self-hostable YesCaptcha-style API
✅ Supports 19 task types including reCAPTCHA v2/v3, hCaptcha, Cloudflare Turnstile
✅ Browser automation with Playwright
✅ Image recognition and classification using local multimodal and vision models
✅ Compatible with OpenAI-compatible multimodal models
✅ FastAPI backend
✅ Easy deployment options (Render, Hugging Face Spaces, Docker)


❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 480 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 166 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

OhMyCaptcha is a self-hostable, YesCaptcha-compatible API service that automates solving various CAPTCHA challenges. It leverages Playwright for browser-based challenges like reCAPTCHA and hCaptcha, and multimodal/vision models for image-based classification tasks, offering a flexible solution for integrating automated CAPTCHA solving into other applications.

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/shenhao-stu/ohmycaptcha

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗡𝗢𝗖𝗧𝗔𝗩𝗢𝗫 | A terminal user interface (TUI) for playing local music files with advanced features like gapless playback and visualizations.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A terminal user interface (TUI) for playing local music files with advanced features like gapless playback and visualizations.
📅 Created: May 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Gapless playback
✅ Queue support
✅ Multi-format audio (mp3, m4a, wav, flac, ogg, opus)
✅ Live library reloading
✅ Custom themeing with hot reload
✅ Vim-like key-bindings
✅ Waveform, oscilloscope, and spectrum visualizations
✅ Playlist management


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 237 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 15 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

NoctaVox is a lightweight, terminal-based music player written in Rust, offering gapless playback, queue support, and various audio visualizations. It provides a customizable TUI experience with Vim-like keybindings and live theme reloading for local audio files.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Jaxx497/NoctaVox

𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗘 | Providing a secure, private, and open-source cloud storage solution with end-to-end encryption for personal data like photos and documents, and a secure authenticator app.  🔥 Super Hot!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 Dart 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Providing a secure, private, and open-source cloud storage solution with end-to-end encryption for personal data like photos and documents, and a secure authenticator app.
📅 Created: Nov 2022 • Updated: Mar 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ End-to-end encryption for all stored data
✅ Open-source platform and client applications
✅ Ente Photos: Google/Apple Photos alternative with features like face detection, semantic search, private sharing, collaborative albums
✅ Ente Locker: Secure storage for documents and credentials
✅ Ente Auth: Open-source, end-to-end encrypted 2FA authenticator
✅ Cross-platform support (iOS, Android, Web, Desktop)
✅ External security audits by reputable firms
✅ Self-hosting option


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 25.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.5K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 507 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Ente provides a fully open-source, end-to-end encrypted cloud platform for storing photos, documents, and credentials, along with a 2FA authenticator app. It prioritizes user privacy by ensuring data is encrypted before it leaves the user's device, meaning even Ente cannot access it. The service offers multiple client applications across various platforms and is externally audited for security.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/ente-io/ente

𝗔𝗨𝗧𝗢𝗚𝗣𝗧 | Automating complex workflows by building, deploying, and managing AI agents.  ✨ Notable!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automating complex workflows by building, deploying, and managing AI agents.
📅 Created: Mar 2023 • Updated: Mar 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Create, deploy, and manage continuous AI agents
✅ Automate complex workflows
✅ Self-hosting and cloud-hosted beta options
✅ Agent Builder for low-code customization
✅ Workflow Management with block-based action connections
✅ Deployment controls for agent lifecycle management
✅ Library of ready-to-use agents


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 182.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 46.2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 233 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

AutoGPT is a platform for creating, deploying, and managing continuous AI agents that automate complex workflows. It offers both self-hosting and a cloud-hosted beta, empowering users to build custom agents or use pre-configured ones through an intuitive interface.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗤𝗨𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗠𝗨 | To quickly and easily create and run optimized virtual machines for various operating systems, including Windows and macOS, on Linux and macOS hosts.  🔥 Super Hot!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To quickly and easily create and run optimized virtual machines for various operating systems, including Windows and macOS, on Linux and macOS hosts.
📅 Created: Mar 2020 • Updated: Mar 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automated OS downloads and configuration via quickget
✅ Optimized VM configuration based on host hardware
✅ Support for Windows (including TPM 2.0), macOS, Linux, BSDs, and more
✅ ARM64 guest support
✅ Full SPICE and VirtIO-webdavd/9p file sharing
✅ QEMU Guest Agent support
✅ VirGL acceleration
✅ USB and Smartcard pass-through
✅ EFI and Legacy BIOS boot support


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 14.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 657 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 22 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Quickemu is a shell script wrapper for QEMU that simplifies the creation and management of virtual machines for Windows, macOS, Linux, and other operating systems. It automates optimal hardware configuration and OS downloads, making virtualization accessible without complex setup.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
